name: AttnRes + GatedAttn + ValueResidual + MTP + AdamTTT + lzma-9
blurb: Builds on 2026-03-24 AttnRes stack. Adds: MTP_NUM_HEADS=1 (free training signal, stripped at export), GATED_ATTENTION=1 (~24KB, per-head input-gated attention), VALUE_RESIDUAL=1 (value-stream skip connection, ~0 bytes), Adam TTT (replaces SGD for better per-chunk adaptation), and lzma preset=9 (improved artifact compression). All eval under 10 min.
author: pending
